title: vitis labrusca
intro: Vitis labrusca, also known as the fox grape or concord grape, is a species of grapevine native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Vitis labrusca include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vitis labrusca include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, certain cancers, and age-related cognitive decline, while also providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Vitis labrusca include infusions, tinctures, and wines, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
